body_txt: Think Most Gamers Are Male ? Well, this one definitely isn't, and don't forget it. She knows all the most brutal Combos in your favorite game as thoroughly as she knows the intricacies of makeup and fashion . Woe to any sexist who challenges her assuming she's a pushover — he will get smugly destroyed and left to slink away in shame after getting Beaten by a Girl . See those three letters at the top of the scoreboard ? Read 'em and weep, boys: 𝙶𝚁𝙻. This character is a female gamer in a setting where geeky interests like video games may not be Acceptable Feminine Goals or hobbies. Thus she tends to be Tomboyish , and even might be a Stereotypical Nerd , Proud to Be a Geek , or One of the Boys . However, she often has a Girly Streak to set her apart, and if any Fanservice focuses on her she is likely to appear conventionally feminine. It is also common for this character to be prodigiously talented and highly skilled in games, maybe even a Godlike Gamer . If she is Only Known by an Avatar , expect any male gamers who meet this Living Legend in person to be surprised she is a girl . This trope has a peculiar relationship with Most Gamers Are Male . It sometimes presents the Opposite by clearly contradicting it. But other times it seems to imply a world where practically All Gamers Are Male , where this character represents an extraordinary one-in-a-million anomaly. Everywhere she goes, people ogle in disbelief at this Oxymoronic Being — they had no idea it was possible for a girl to play games, much less be good at them! Clearly she is special and Not Like Other Girls . If indeed she's the only female character in the cast, The Smurfette Principle may take effect. And if her Token Minority status is correlated to her amazing skill, she is a Flawless Token . This interpretation of the trope is pretty silly and carries some Unfortunate Implications . Girls and women are part of gaming and always have been from the start . For some games or genres, statistically most players are male, but that does not make it extraordinary or strange for females to play. And as gaming increases in accessibility and mainstream visibility, it becomes even easier to find all kinds of girls playing all kinds of games, making this increasingly Broken . But this is an Evolving Trope , not a Discredited one. Unfortunately, sexism remains a problem in gaming and geek communities. Some female gamers still face misogynist attitudes that demean them as weird anomalies, unwelcome newcomers, or even impostors. This character faces such detractors head-on with style, ready to stomp them like tiresome Goombas . And importantly, the Rule of Cool is in this character's favor, because an obviously appealing Power Fantasy is embodied by Her Majesty the undisputed Arcade Queen! Almost guaranteed to show up in a Two Gamers on a Couch series. Compare Hackette , Otaku Surrogate , and this character's athletic Sister the Passionate Sports Girl . It is the Distaff Counterpart of Stock '90s Bad Boy . Contrast Dungeonmaster's Girlfriend , Nerd Nanny .
